source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Riser Skate

event.top_event: Structural damage to riser skate from dropped spanner joint assembly
actions_taken: Red Zone Management was in place
BSEE investigation team collected documentation and photos
Noble to review and update Rigging and Lifting operations procedures
Noble to update JSA on Making Lifts with Web Slings
Crane operator to be coached on compliance with Rigging and Lifting policies
event.summary: On July 22, 2022, at 2203 hours, a spanner joint assembly being lifted by tandem lift (topdrive and crane) on the drillship Noble Stanley Lafosse experienced failure of the nylon sling tail line. The assembly dropped approximately 6 feet onto the riser skate deck. Investigation revealed the crane operator failed to create a new Permit to Work and Lift Plan, instead reusing an expired permit for chrome tubing. The nylon sling used was rated for only 5,100 pounds in choker arrangement but was required to lift approximately 15,000 pounds. No injuries occurred due to Red Zone Management and personnel positioning.
recommendations: Update Rigging and Lifting operation procedures to clearly define tandem lifts with multiple lifting devices
Include guidelines for lifting third-party equipment to and from drill floor
Update JSA on Making Lifts with Web Slings to require transition to work meeting agreement on lift type and documentation
Coach crane operator on correct compliance with Rigging and Lifting, Safe System to Work, DROPS policies and Temporary Drop Zones

threats.name: Nylon sling failure due to overload
Inadequate lift planning and permit control
Improper equipment selection without SWL verification
Personnel entry into Temporary Drop Zone without authorization

consequences.name: Potential personnel injury or fatality from dropped load

controls.name: Permit to Work (PTW) system for lifting operations
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to ensure proper authorization and planning
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to prevent unauthorized or improperly planned lifts

supporting_text: the Noble Crane Operator and his crew failed to complete a new Permit To Work (PTW) and a Lift Plan for this operation
The previous PTW and Lift Plan was for lifting chrome tubing for the tubing operation. This permit for lifting chrome tubing had expired

controls.name: Lift Plan with equipment specifications and Safe Working Load verification
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to ensure correct equipment selection and load rating
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to prevent use of undersized lifting equipment

supporting_text: the crane operator allowed his crew to use the nylon sling without verifying the Safe Working Load (SWL) which was rated to pick up approximately 5,100 pounds in the choker arrangement
The end of the spanner joint assembly was found to weigh approximately 15,000 pounds

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for lifting operations
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify hazards and plan safe work procedures
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to ensure hazard identification and procedure planning

supporting_text: PRT Offshore crew completed a Job Safety Analysis (JSA) on Spanner Joint Rig-Up prior to hoisting the spanner joint to the rig floor
Noble will update their JSA on Making Lifts with Web Slings to include during transition to work meeting with all agreeing on type of lift being performed

controls.name: Transition to Work (TTW) meeting with all personnel
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to ensure communication and agreement on lift procedures
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to ensure all parties understand and agree on lift methodology

supporting_text: On the night of July 22, 2022, the drill crew held a Transition to Work (TTW) meeting in the driller's shack prior to the lifting operation of the spanner joint assembly to the drill floor
The TTW meeting was attended by the Noble drill crew, crane crew, and Professional Rental Tools (TRP) Offshore technicians

controls.name: Equipment inspection and approval by qualified personnel
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to verify lifting gear suitability
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to catch equipment deficiencies before lift

supporting_text: The driller inspected and approved the lifting gear connected to the spanner joint assembly
One of the PRT technicians noticed that the wire rope sling was connected to the crane by a swivel shackle that was not rated for lifting the entire weight of the spanner joint assembly
He immediately notified the crane crew members and informed them of his findings

controls.name: Red Zone Management and personnel exclusion
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to prevent personnel exposure to dropped load hazard
controls.lod_basis: Secondary control to mitigate consequence of load drop

supporting_text: Red Zone Management was in place and the nearest individual was approximately 22 feet away from the incident

controls.name: Temporary Drop Zone access control and Permit to Work
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to prevent unauthorized personnel entry into drop zones
controls.lod_basis: Secondary control to prevent personnel exposure during lift operations

supporting_text: a PRT Offshore technician was allowed to walk past the suspended spanner joint in a Temporary Drop Zone just before the nylon sling parted
The Noble crane operator and crane crew allowed the technician to enter the Temporary Drop Zone area without a Permit to Work

controls.name: Rigging and Lifting procedures for tandem lifts
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to define proper procedures for multi-device lifts
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to ensure correct methodology for complex lifting operations

supporting_text: Noble has reviewed and will consider updating the Rigging and Lifting operation to clearly define tandem lifts with multiple lifting devices
include a section with guidelines to follow when lifting third party equipment to and from the drill floor

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
